name: Circulating Factor Modulation Coverage Repair
summary: Coverage repair stages healthy-adult plasmapheresis limiting evidence, real-world Alzheimer TPE disease-boundary evidence, young-donor plasma exchange preprint context, microplastics TPE biomarker context, no-results registries, FDA young-plasma safety context, review-level taxonomy boundaries, and a staged outlook refresh that keeps stage, momentum, and confidence unchanged.

scope.question: Which June 9 source-completeness gaps for circulating factor modulation should become public records, and do they change the public evidence stage or boundaries?

proposed_changes.summary: Stage an intervention boundary record for circulating-factor taxonomy repair.
proposed_changes.rationale: Plasma-removal or plasma-donation procedure tracked separately from albumin-replacement TPE, young plasma, IVIG-combination TPE, and neutral blood exchange.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage an intervention boundary record for circulating-factor taxonomy repair.
proposed_changes.rationale: Plasma exchange or dilution followed by replacement with young or healthy donor plasma, tracked separately from simple young-plasma infusion and from TPE with albumin or IVIG.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a source needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: Scientific Reports healthy blood-donor study of repeated plasmapheresis without young plasma or albumin replacement, reporting lipid and protein shifts but no epigenetic rejuvenation and possible acceleration on several clock measures.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a source needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: ClinicalTrials.gov registry for the completed prospective case-crossover plasma-donation study linked to PMID 40592961, with no registry-posted results in the June 9, 2026 API view.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a source needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: Journal of Alzheimer's Disease real-world Argentina cohort comparing 32 treated mild-to-moderate Alzheimer disease patients with historical controls after repeated therapeutic plasma exchange.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a source needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: medRxiv preprint reporting a 12-patient pilot of young-donor plasma exchange in mild cognitive impairment with biomarker evidence of Alzheimer disease, focused on safety, feasibility, treatment burden, and short-term clinical trajectories.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a source needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: ClinicalTrials.gov early phase 1 single-group registry for plasma dilution and young or healthy donor plasma infusion in mild cognitive impairment, unknown status with no registry-posted results in the June 9, 2026 API view.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a source needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: Journal of Clinical Apheresis paper measuring circulating microplastics before and after 174 therapeutic plasma exchange procedures in 114 patients, with reductions at high baseline levels and a low-baseline tubing-leaching limitation.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a source needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: ClinicalTrials.gov randomized open-label aging-biomarker plasmapheresis registry comparing albumin compensation with no albumin compensation, unknown status with no posted results in the June 9, 2026 API view.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a source needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: ClinicalTrials.gov early phase 1 single-group age-related frailty plasmapheresis registry, unknown status with estimated 2025 completion and no posted results in the June 9, 2026 API view.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a source needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: ClinicalTrials.gov registry for the published randomized TPE and TPE plus IVIG biomarker trial; the registry remains active not recruiting and has no registry-posted results in the June 9, 2026 API view.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a source needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: GeroScience review of plasma-based systemic rejuvenation strategies and translational limits, used as review-level context for separating plasma dilution, donor plasma, TPE, and factor-specific claims.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a source needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: Transfusion and Apheresis Science review of immune-modulation mechanisms of therapeutic plasma exchange, used for procedure-boundary and safety-limit context rather than primary aging efficacy.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a source needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: FDA safety communication cautioning against for-profit young-donor plasma infusions promoted for aging, memory loss, dementia, Alzheimer disease, and other conditions, citing no proven clinical benefit and plasma-product risks.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a study or registry record needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: Prospective case-crossover study of healthy plasma donors aged 40 to 60, testing repeated plasmapheresis without young plasma or albumin replacement against biochemical and epigenetic aging readouts.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a study or registry record needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: Real-world treated cohort of mild-to-moderate Alzheimer disease patients receiving repeated TPE compared with historical controls.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a study or registry record needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: Pilot safety and feasibility study using plasma dilution and young-donor plasma replacement in 12 patients with mild cognitive impairment and Alzheimer disease biomarker evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a study or registry record needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: Procedure series measuring blood microplastics before and after therapeutic plasma exchange in 114 patients and 174 procedures.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a study or registry record needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: Unknown-status randomized registry comparing plasmapheresis with albumin compensation versus plasmapheresis without albumin compensation for aging-biomarker correction.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a study or registry record needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: Unknown-status early phase 1 registry testing repeated plasmapheresis for age-related frailty with Canadian Study of Health and Aging Clinical Frailty Scale outcome.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a study or registry record needed to repair circulating-factor coverage.
proposed_changes.rationale: A randomized placebo-controlled trial comparing TPE, TPE plus IVIG, and sham in adults over 50 with multi-omic aging-marker readouts.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a finding needed to repair circulating-factor interpretation.
proposed_changes.rationale: Healthy-adult repeated plasmapheresis shifted several biochemical markers but did not produce epigenetic rejuvenation and showed possible acceleration on several epigenetic clock or pace measures.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a finding needed to repair circulating-factor interpretation.
proposed_changes.rationale: A real-world Alzheimer disease cohort reported slower MMSE and memory decline after repeated TPE compared with matched historical controls, with no severe adverse events reported.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a finding needed to repair circulating-factor interpretation.
proposed_changes.rationale: Preprint-only pilot data report feasible young-donor plasma exchange in twelve MCI patients, but uncontrolled design and preprint status keep it from changing efficacy claims.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a finding needed to repair circulating-factor interpretation.
proposed_changes.rationale: Therapeutic plasma exchange reduced circulating microplastic counts in high-baseline patients but showed a low-baseline tubing-leaching limitation, making it toxin-removal context rather than aging evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a finding needed to repair circulating-factor interpretation.
proposed_changes.rationale: NCT04897113 remains unknown status with estimated 2022 completion and no posted results in the June 9, 2026 API view.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a finding needed to repair circulating-factor interpretation.
proposed_changes.rationale: NCT05054894 remains unknown status with estimated 2025 completion and no posted results in the June 9, 2026 API view.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a finding needed to repair circulating-factor interpretation.
proposed_changes.rationale: NCT06534450 is tied to the public randomized TPE biomarker source but remains active not recruiting with no ClinicalTrials.gov results in the June 9, 2026 API view.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a finding needed to repair circulating-factor interpretation.
proposed_changes.rationale: Review-level context supports separating plasma-based rejuvenation strategies by modality, endpoint, and translational maturity rather than treating them as one intervention class.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a finding needed to repair circulating-factor interpretation.
proposed_changes.rationale: Review-level context supports treating TPE as a broad immune-modulating procedure with protocol-specific effects rather than a simple circulating-factor rejuvenation mechanism.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a finding needed to repair circulating-factor interpretation.
proposed_changes.rationale: FDA cautioned consumers that young-donor plasma infusions promoted for aging, memory loss, Alzheimer disease, and other conditions lack proven clinical benefit and carry plasma-product risks.

proposed_changes.summary: Stage a cautious outlook refresh that keeps the public rating unchanged.
proposed_changes.rationale: The repaired evidence map changes public boundaries and support links but does not justify changing evidence_stage, momentum, or confidence.

proposed_outlook_implications.note: Coverage repair improves source completeness and public boundary wording, but keeps Circulating Factor Modulation at low-confidence human_functional_benefit with mixed momentum because new evidence is disease-specific, biomarker-level, preprint-only, no-results registry context, regulatory safety context, or review-level boundary support.

next_actions: Publication complete. Review downstream pages if this change affects shared surfaces.
